author: Pokémon 公式
text:
Pokémon: Dragonite and the Special Delivery ✉️ | FULL EPISODE
Hana dreams of becoming an ace mail carrier, just like her hero, Dragonite. 🧡 Upon finding a letter with no address, she journeys with her partner Pokémon, Fuecoco, to locate the sender. Will Hana and Fuecoco find the mystery sender and get the letter to its destination? ✉️

Watch what unfolds in this episode, “Pokémon: Dragonite and the Special Delivery”!

Find all your favorite Pokémon merchandise at the official Pokémon Center: https://www.pokemoncenter.com/

Roy and Ult are in a losing battle with the Explorers, but then the Dragon Pokémon shows up.
